rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 6, 2015 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC,'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress (no outrageous conduct alleged and no possibility of amendment suggested) and Ejectment (possessory interest has not been properly terminated per the terms of the contract and no possibility of amendment suggested). = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Pure Entertainment, Llcs And Vlad Coods Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Third Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 6, 2015 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTS PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, and VLAD COOD's Motion To Strike Third Amended Cross-Complaint moot. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross-Complainants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To C.C.P. §425.16 Against Cross-Defendants And Attorneys Jose A. Cordova And Matthew W. Kumin
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 6, 2015 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT KATIE HOM's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To C.C.P. §425.16 Against Cross-Defendants And Attorneys Jose A. Cordova And Matthew W. Kumin DENIED. Cross-Defendants' CCP 425.16 Motion is not frivolous within the meaning of CCP 128.5. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD JOHNSON VS. JAMES JOHNSON SR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 6, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANTS JAMES JOHNSON, JEANELL JOHNSON and ASHLEY KNOX's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Complaint states no cause of action and no possibility of amendment. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 6, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT STEPHEN GUDE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to July 13, 2015 per July 2, 2015 ex-parte order. = (501/GLW)
